title: Hearty Delight Cake
description: A scrumptious heart-shaped cake like this is sure to melt the recipient's heart into happy tears, as he/she relishes it. Adding much of wowness to this gorgeous cake, you can even get this cake personalised with a loving photo of the recipient so, this cake makes a special place in his/her heart.  Avoid placing the photo and poster cake in a refrigerator as the chilled droplets can spoil the photo on the top of the cake.
